title: Glowing Armor Trims
description: Makes the new 1.20 armor trims glow in the dark, Shiny, Visible, Emissive, Outline, Trims, 1.20
body:
# **Glow in the dark 1.20 armor trims**

![enter image description here](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/bsBedndu/images/8476bc2dac352be820da19af952c8278d4aaea93.png)

i know the 1.20 version is not working i am trying to figure out why

requires emissive textures. [Optifine](https://www.optifine.net/downloads)

[CurseForge Listing](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/glowing-armor-trims-countxd)
